[V. Non-Functional Requirements 33](#_heading=h.ykbcevq04e1v)

[This section defines measurable non-functional requirements and constraints for the EduNexus Platform. The requirements below support the business flows for course publishing, class setup, student enrollment/payment, learning assessment, and class administration. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[1\. External Interfaces 33](#_heading=h.58500tbcg9cf)

[EduNexus communicates with external services for authentication, AI support, video learning content, payment confirmation, and notifications. Each integration must fail safely without granting unauthorized access or publishing unreviewed content. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Interface 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Purpose 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Key Requirements 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Related Scope 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Google Identity 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Supports Google OAuth sign-up and sign-in. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Identity data must be verified before account creation or login. If the same email already exists, the Google identity is linked to the existing account instead of creating a duplicate. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Registration, sign-in, account identity 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI Language Model 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Supports draft lesson summaries, questions, flashcards, and preliminary essay grading. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI output is support-only. AI-generated questions, flashcards, summaries, and grading results require authorized review before official use or publication. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Content authoring, practice, essay grading 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[YouTube Data API 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Validates YouTube video links and transcript/caption availability for lesson content. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[If a video or transcript is unavailable, video summary support is disabled for that item while manual content authoring remains available. 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Lesson content and video summary 33](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment Gateway (VNPay / SePay) 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Confirms payments and refund-related status for paid enrollments. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment callbacks must be signature-validated and idempotent. Failed, invalid, expired, unsigned, or duplicate callbacks must not grant duplicate access. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Checkout, enrollment, refund 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Notification / Mail Service 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Sends system notifications such as account invitations, payment results, class reminders, grade confirmations, and subscription expiry warnings. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Notification failure must not break core transactions. Failed jobs should be logged and retried according to the background-job rules. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Class operation and administration 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2\. Quality Attributes 34](#_heading=h.bit6im9ttthz)

[2.1 Usability 34](#_heading=h.2gqif0v9afwm)

[Requirement 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Target / Rule 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Condition 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Role-based navigation 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[After sign-in, users are directed to the correct workspace based on role: Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager, or Student. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[All authenticated sessions 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Clear user feedback 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[The system displays clear success, warning, error, empty-state, and pending-state messages for registration, checkout, content publishing, AI processing, and grading. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[All UI workflows 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Student learning clarity 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Students can clearly see accessible courses/classes, learning progress, practice results, essay status, and confirmed feedback. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Student dashboard and learning workspace 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Content review clarity 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[SMEs and Teachers can distinguish draft, pending-review, approved, rejected, published, and confirmed states before taking action. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Content authoring and grading flows 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Responsive interface 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Core pages remain usable on common laptop and tablet screen sizes without horizontal scrolling for normal forms and tables. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Catalog, dashboard, learning, admin pages 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Import error visibility 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[When bulk import is used, valid rows and invalid rows are reported separately so users can correct only failed rows. 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Question Excel import and flashcard CSV import 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2.2 Performance 34](#_heading=h.4wq4xdnzw2iz)

[Requirement 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Target 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Condition 34](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Page load time 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Common pages load within 3 seconds. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Up to 100 active users on a normal deployment 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Search and filtering 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Course catalog, user lists, enrollment lists, and payment lists respond within 2 seconds for common filters. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Normal dataset size for the project version 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Form submission response 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[The system acknowledges normal create/update/submit actions within 2 seconds. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Registration, course content save, checkout start, essay submission 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment callback processing 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Verified payment callbacks are processed within 5 seconds and update access status once. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[VNPay / SePay callback received by the system 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Dashboard and reports 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Aggregated dashboards load within 5 seconds. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Course Manager and Admin report views 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[File upload limit 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[The system accepts supported learning and submission files up to the configured size limit and rejects unsupported files with a clear message. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Lesson attachments, import files, essay submissions 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI and transcript processing 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Long-running AI or YouTube transcript tasks run asynchronously and show a pending/failed state instead of blocking the user interface. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI generation, video summary, preliminary grading 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2.3 Security and Privacy 35](#_heading=h.q48a1xnh3pki)

[Requirement 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Rule 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Applies To 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Authentication required 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[All private dashboards and actions require a valid signed-in session. Only public catalog preview, registration, and sign-in are accessible without authentication. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Private system pages 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Role-based authorization 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Each action is restricted by role and assigned scope. Course Managers operate only within assigned CourseGroups; Teachers operate only on assigned classes; Students see only their own learning data. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager, Student 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Paid access validation 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Every request to paid content checks that the Student has a valid active Enrollment or subscription access record. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Courses, classes, lessons, practice, assessments 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment protection 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment references are unique, callbacks are verified, and duplicate callbacks cannot create duplicate access grants. 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Payment and enrollment 35](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Password protection 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Passwords must not be stored or displayed in readable form. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Email/password accounts 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI result protection 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI preliminary scores and AI-generated content are not exposed as final official results until authorized confirmation or approval is complete. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI content and essay grading 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[File access control 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Attached files, import files, and student submissions must not be accessible through guessable public links. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Attachments and submissions 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Audit trail 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Important actions are logged with actor, time, action, target, and result. Activity logs are not editable through the user interface. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Admin actions, payments, access changes, publishing, grading 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2.4 Reliability and Data Integrity 36](#_heading=h.aa5sfbsh0c0x)

[Requirement 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Target / Rule 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Condition 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Safe external failure 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[If AI, YouTube, payment, or notification services are unavailable, the system records the failure and preserves existing user data. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[External service failure 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[No automatic AI publishing 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI-generated drafts never enter the official live bank or final gradebook automatically. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI generation and grading 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Learning history preservation 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Access expiry, revocation, refund, or class closure never deletes progress, practice results, or submissions. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Enrollment expiry/revocation 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Refund consistency 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Access is revoked before refund completion, and the learning history remains available for audit/reporting. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Refund processing 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Class content integrity 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Teacher class supplements do not overwrite original SME-owned course content. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Teacher-added class materials 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Scheduled job resilience 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Background jobs for access expiry, reminders, reports, AI retry, and audit retention may be retried safely without duplicating grants or messages beyond the configured retry policy. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Background jobs 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2.5 Maintainability and Compatibility 36](#_heading=h.ik59nofeftvu)

[Requirement 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Rule 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Applies To 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Stable identifiers 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[BF-ID, UC-ID, FT-ID, GBR-ID, JOB-ID, and MSG codes should remain stable once assigned so PRD, UCS, and TDS remain traceable. 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Documentation and implementation traceability 36](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Configurable external services 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[External service endpoints, credentials, quotas, and retry settings are configuration values, not hard-coded business rules. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Google, AI, YouTube, payment, mail 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Browser compatibility 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[The web interface supports current versions of common desktop browsers used by students and staff. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Web UI 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Business-layer enforcement 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Critical rules such as role scope, access validity, AI approval, and payment idempotency are enforced by the system layer, not only by hiding UI buttons. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Security and business rules 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[2.6 Technical Assumptions and Out of Scope 37](#_heading=h.tpovpnugkq6x)

[Item 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Statement 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Technical assumption 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[EduNexus is delivered as a web-based platform with role-based dashboards and external integrations for Google OAuth, AI support, YouTube transcript validation, payment gateways, and notifications. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Technical assumption 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[AI features are supportive features. The platform must remain usable through manual authoring and manual grading when AI support is unavailable. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Out of scope 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Unreviewed automatic publishing of AI-generated course content, questions, flashcards, or final essay grades. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Out of scope 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Offline learning mode and native mobile applications for this version. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Out of scope 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Direct modification of SME-owned original course content by Teachers. Teachers may only add class-level supplements. 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Out of scope 37](#_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav)

[Public access to paid learning content without verified enrollment or valid subscription access. 37](#_heading=h.j1kurpasnkzl)

[1\. Global Business Rules 37](#_heading=h.tjafhlf8jb3m)

# I. Business Flows

## 1\. Overview

### a. Context Diagram

_The context diagram shows EduNexus Platform and its external actors/systems, including Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager, Student, Guest, Google Identity, AI Language Model, YouTube Data API, and Payment Gateway._

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### b. Business Flow Index

| BF-ID | Flow Name                                      | Primary Actors                                   | Trigger                                                                             | End Condition                                                                                                    |
| ----- | ---------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| BF-01 | Course Content Creation and Publishing         | Admin, SME, YouTube Data API, AI Language Model  | Admin assigns SME/content work or SME starts course content authoring               | Course content is reviewed and published for later class setup/use                                               |
| ---   | ---                                            | ---                                              | ---                                                                                 | ---                                                                                                              |
| BF-02 | Class Opening and Access Setup                 | Admin, Course Manager, Teacher                   | Admin creates a course group and assigns Course Manager responsibility              | Class is configured and ready for student enrollment                                                             |
| ---   | ---                                            | ---                                              | ---                                                                                 | ---                                                                                                              |
| BF-03 | Student Registration, Enrollment, and Payment  | Guest, Google Identity, Student, Payment Gateway | Guest or Student wants to register, sign in, and purchase/enroll in learning access | Student receives access after successful verified payment, or access remains pending if payment is not confirmed |
| ---   | ---                                            | ---                                              | ---                                                                                 | ---                                                                                                              |
| BF-04 | Learning, Practice, and Assessment             | Student, AI Language Model, Teacher              | Student opens authorized learning workspace and starts learning/practice/assessment | Student views confirmed feedback, result, or learning progress                                                   |
| ---   | ---                                            | ---                                              | ---                                                                                 | ---                                                                                                              |
| BF-05 | Class Operation, Analytics, and Administration | Teacher, Course Manager, Admin, Payment Gateway  | Assigned class is active and operational monitoring/administration is needed        | Reports, access status, payment/refund status, and operational data are updated                                  |
| ---   | ---                                            | ---                                              | ---                                                                                 | ---                                                                                                              |

## 2\. BF-01: Course Content Creation and Publishing

**Trigger:** Admin assigns SME/content work or SME starts course content authoring.

**End condition:** Course content is reviewed and published for later class setup/use.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| Step | Actor             | Action                                                                                 |
| ---- | ----------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Admin             | Assigns SME work and content responsibility.                                           |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 2    | SME               | Builds the course structure.                                                           |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 3    | SME               | Creates lessons, videos, and learning materials.                                       |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 4    | YouTube Data API  | Validates video link and transcript/caption availability when YouTube content is used. |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 5    | AI Language Model | Generates AI content support for drafts, summaries, questions, or flashcards.          |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 6    | SME               | Reviews content and assessments before official use.                                   |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |
| 7    | SME               | Publishes approved course content.                                                     |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                                                    |

Exception paths:

\- If the YouTube video or transcript is unavailable, video summary support is unavailable but manual content authoring continues.

\- If AI support fails, SME continues authoring manually and may retry AI assistance later.

\- AI-generated content is draft/support only and must be reviewed before publishing.

## 3\. BF-02: Class Opening and Access Setup

**Trigger:** Admin creates a course group and assigns Course Manager responsibility.

**End condition:** Class is configured and ready for student enrollment.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| Step | Actor          | Action                                        |
| ---- | -------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Admin          | Creates the course group.                     |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |
| 2    | Admin          | Assigns Course Manager responsibility.        |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |
| 3    | Course Manager | Opens the class from approved course content. |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |
| 4    | Course Manager | Configures pricing or subscription settings.  |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |
| 5    | Teacher        | Adds class-specific materials.                |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |
| 6    | Teacher        | Confirms the class is ready for enrollment.   |
| ---  | ---            | ---                                           |

Exception paths:

\- Teacher-added class materials do not overwrite SME-owned original course content.

\- Course Manager operates only within assigned course groups.

## 4\. BF-03: Student Registration, Enrollment, and Payment

**Trigger:** Guest or Student wants to register, sign in, and purchase/enroll in learning access.

**End condition:** Student receives access after successful verified payment, or access remains pending if payment is not confirmed.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| Step | Actor           | Action                                                         |
| ---- | --------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Guest           | Browses public catalog and previews available content.         |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 2    | Guest           | Registers or signs in.                                         |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 3    | Google Identity | Verifies OAuth identity if Google sign-in is selected.         |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 4    | Student         | Chooses course, class, or access plan.                         |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 5    | Student         | Completes checkout.                                            |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 6    | Payment Gateway | Confirms payment status.                                       |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 7    | Student         | Receives authorized access when payment is verified.           |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |
| 8    | Student         | Remains in access pending state when payment is not confirmed. |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                            |

Exception paths:

\- Email/password registration does not use Google Identity.

\- Access is granted only after verified successful payment confirmation.

\- Failed, unsigned, invalid, or duplicate payment confirmations must not grant duplicate access.

## 5\. BF-04: Learning, Practice, and Assessment

**Trigger:** Student opens authorized learning workspace and starts learning/practice/assessment.

**End condition:** Student views confirmed feedback, result, or learning progress.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| Step | Actor             | Action                                                 |
| ---- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1    | Student           | Opens the learning workspace.                          |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |
| 2    | Student           | Studies lessons and practices learning activities.     |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |
| 3    | Student           | Submits essay or assessment work.                      |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |
| 4    | AI Language Model | Provides preliminary grading support where applicable. |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |
| 5    | Teacher           | Confirms the final grade and feedback.                 |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |
| 6    | Student           | Views feedback, result, and personal progress.         |
| ---  | ---               | ---                                                    |

Exception paths:

\- AI grading is preliminary only and is not visible as final result to Student before Teacher confirmation.

\- If AI grading is unavailable, Teacher can grade manually.

\- Teacher confirmation is required before final grade/feedback is returned.

## 6\. BF-05: Class Operation, Analytics, and Administration

**Trigger:** Assigned class is active and operational monitoring/administration is needed.

**End condition:** Reports, access status, payment/refund status, and operational data are updated.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

| Step | Actor           | Action                                                                         |
| ---- | --------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 1    | Teacher         | Monitors assigned class progress.                                              |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 2    | Teacher         | Sends reminders or class notifications.                                        |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 3    | Course Manager  | Monitors enrollment, revenue, and refund-related status within assigned scope. |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 4    | Admin           | Monitors system and audit status.                                              |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 5    | Admin           | Handles system configuration or escalation.                                    |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 6    | Payment Gateway | Returns payment or refund status.                                              |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |
| 7    | Admin           | Updates reports and access status.                                             |
| ---  | ---             | ---                                                                            |

Exception paths:

\- Course Manager operates within assigned course groups.

\- Admin handles system-wide monitoring, configuration, audit, and escalations.

\- Refund/access changes must preserve learning history.

# II. Conceptual Data Model

## 1\. Entity Relationship Diagram

![](data:image/png;base64,)

## 2\. Entity Description

### 2.1. Entity: User

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                      |
| --------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | Every person with an account on EduNexus, regardless of role. Covers internal staff and external learners.                                     |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                            |
| **Key business attributes** | Display name, email, role (Admin / SME / Teacher / Course Manager / Student), authentication provider (email / Google), avatar, account status |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                            |
| **Business identity**       | Email is unique across the system. A Google-linked sign-up reuses the existing record with the same email instead of creating a duplicate.     |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                            |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Active (normal) · Disabled (deactivated by Admin - sessions terminated immediately)                                                            |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                            |

### 2.2. Entity: CourseGroup

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | A thematic grouping of related Courses. Defines the scope a Course Manager is assigned to and the scope a subscription plan covers. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                 |
| **Key business attributes** | Group name, description, assigned Course Managers, creator                                                                          |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                 |
| **Business identity**       | Group name should be distinct to stay meaningful but is not a hard system key. Only Admin may create, rename, or delete groups.     |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                 |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Active (no formal status workflow). Cannot be deleted while any student holds an active subscription within it.                     |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                 |

### 2.3. Entity: Course

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                                   |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | The master content container authored by an SME. Classes read content directly from the Course rather than copying it.                                      |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Key business attributes** | Title, description, owning CourseGroup, assigned SME, unit price (H1), catalog visibility, version number                                                   |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Business identity**       | No natural unique key - multiple courses may share a title. Each course belongs to exactly one CourseGroup.                                                 |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft -> Published -> Locked-for-edit -> Published (re-publish increments version) -> Archived (terminal). Must have at least one Module before publishing. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                         |

### 2.2.4. Entity: Module

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                     |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | An ordered section within a Course that groups its learning content (lessons, questions, flashcards, essays). |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                           |
| **Key business attributes** | Title, owning Course, display order                                                                           |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                           |
| **Business identity**       | Ordered within its parent Course. A module has no meaning outside the course that contains it.                |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                           |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | No independent status - a module is visible when its parent Course is Published.                              |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                           |

### 2.5. Entity: Lesson

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                     |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | A text / video / file learning unit inside a Module. Holds reading content, an embedded YouTube video, an AI summary, and attached materials. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                           |
| **Key business attributes** | Title, owning Module, lesson body (markdown), YouTube video URL, AI video summary, attached files, display order, AI-generated flag           |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                           |
| **Business identity**       | Belongs to exactly one Module and is ordered within it.                                                                                       |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                           |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft · Published. AI-assisted drafts must be reviewed and accepted by the SME before publishing; AI output is never published automatically. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                           |

### 2.6. Entity: Question

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | A multiple-choice item in the course question bank, used to auto-generate practice quizzes.                                                                     |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Key business attributes** | Owning Module, question content, answer options, correct answer, explanation, difficulty, source (manual / import / AI)                                         |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Business identity**       | Belongs to exactly one Module; only meaningful within that module's bank.                                                                                       |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft · Pending-review (AI, awaiting SME approval) · Approved · Rejected (terminal). Manual items are approved immediately; AI items must pass the review gate. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                             |

### 2.7. Entity: Flashcard

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                  |
| --------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | A term-definition card grouped by topic for memorization practice.                                                         |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                        |
| **Key business attributes** | Owning Module, group name, front text, back text, display order, source (manual / import / AI)                             |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                        |
| **Business identity**       | Belongs to one Module within a flashcard group.                                                                            |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                        |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft · Pending-review (AI) · Approved · Rejected (terminal). AI-generated cards require SME approval before official use. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                        |

### 2.8. Entity: Assignment

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                   |
| --------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | An essay assignment with a grading rubric. Receives student Submissions for grading.                                        |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                         |
| **Key business attributes** | Owning Module, title, prompt, rubric criteria & weights, maximum score, creator (SME original vs. Teacher class-supplement) |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                         |
| **Business identity**       | Belongs to one Module. Teacher class-specific assignments are stored as supplements and never alter SME-owned content.      |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                         |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft · Published. A class-supplement assignment is scoped to its class only.                                               |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                         |

### 2.9. Entity: Class

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | An instance of a Course opened for a specific cohort, taught by a Teacher. May be free (Admin invites students) or paid (students self-enroll). |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                             |
| **Key business attributes** | Class name, source Course, assigned Teacher, start date, end date, maximum size, fee (0 = free)                                                 |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                             |
| **Business identity**       | No natural unique key. Each class derives all base content from one source Course; teacher supplements are stored separately.                   |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                             |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Draft -> Upcoming -> Active -> Closed (terminal). Access is revoked automatically within 1 hour of the end date; learning history is preserved. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                             |

### 2.10. Entity: SubscriptionPlan

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                       |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | A time-limited offer (1, 3, 6, or 12 months) granting access to all Courses within one CourseGroup - the H3 monetization model. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                             |
| **Key business attributes** | Plan name, owning CourseGroup, duration in months, price, active flag                                                           |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                             |
| **Business identity**       | Belongs to one CourseGroup. Created only by a Course Manager within their assigned group scope.                                 |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                             |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Active · Inactive (hidden from catalog; existing grants remain valid until their own expiry).                                   |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                             |

### 2.11. Entity: Enrollment

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | The permission record that authorizes a Student to access paid content. Unifies all three models: H1 one-off course purchase, H2 class enrollment, H3 group subscription.        |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Key business attributes** | Student, access type (H1 / H2 / H3), target (Course / Class / SubscriptionPlan), valid-from, valid-until, status                                                                 |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Business identity**       | Identified by student + access type + target. Exactly one target (course / class / plan) is set per record, matching the access type.                                            |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Active -> Expired (terminal - H2/H3 reach valid-until; H1 never expires) or Revoked (terminal - refund). Access is revoked before any refund; learning history is never deleted. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                              |

### 2.12. Entity: Payment

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                         |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | The financial transaction that pays for an Enrollment through VNPay or SePay. Payment outcome is captured separately from the access grant.       |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                               |
| **Key business attributes** | Owning Enrollment, student, amount, gateway (VNPay / SePay), payment reference, status, paid-at, refunded-at                                      |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                               |
| **Business identity**       | Payment reference must be unique to guarantee a duplicate gateway callback never grants access twice. A free (fee = 0) enrollment has no Payment. |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                               |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Pending -> Confirmed (activates its Enrollment) -> Refunded (terminal). Failed / Expired callbacks never grant access.                            |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                               |

### 2.13. Entity: Submission

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                                                |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **Purpose**                 | A Student's attempt against an Assignment or a practice quiz. Covers an essay submission (graded) and a self-test practice attempt (self-assessment only).               |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Key business attributes** | Assignment / quiz scope, student, submission type (essay / practice-test), submitted content or answers, AI preliminary result, final teacher result, confirming teacher |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Business identity**       | For essays, a student may submit at most once per assignment - student + assignment is unique. Practice attempts are not limited.                                        |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Essay: Submitted -> AI-scored -> Teacher-confirmed (terminal). Practice test: completed immediately on submission. A final grade is never finalized automatically.       |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                      |

### 2.14. Entity: Progress

| **Field**                   | **Value**                                                                                                                                                           |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Purpose**                 | Tracks an individual Student's progress against a learning item so the personal dashboard and class analytics can be derived.                                       |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Key business attributes** | Student, item reference (Lesson / Question / Flashcard), progress type (lesson-complete / flashcard-mastery / test-score), progress payload, last-updated timestamp |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Business identity**       | Identified by student + item + progress type. Flashcard mastery is tracked per individual card. A student sees only their own records.                              |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Status / lifecycle**      | Continuously updated as the student learns; no terminal state. Practice-test data never affects official gradebook figures.                                         |
| ---                         | ---                                                                                                                                                                 |

## 3\. Data Business Rules

| **Rule**                                  | **Description**                                                                                                                                                                                          | **Enforced On**                               |
| ----------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| **Unique email identity**                 | No two User accounts may share an email address. A Google sign-up whose email already exists is linked to that account instead of creating a duplicate.                                                  | Account registration; Google account linking  |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Single SME owner per course**           | Each Course is authored by exactly one assigned SME. Teachers may add class-level supplements but can never modify or delete the original course content.                                                | Course authoring; teacher supplement creation |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Classes read live course content**      | A Class never stores its own copy of course content - it always reads from the source Course. Re-publishing updated course content is reflected in every class immediately.                              | Content publishing; class content access      |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Course requires a module to publish**   | A Course cannot move to Published unless it contains at least one Module.                                                                                                                                | Course publishing                             |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **AI content needs approval**             | Questions and flashcards generated by AI enter a pending-review state and become usable only after an SME approves them. The system never adds AI content to the live bank automatically.                | AI content generation; SME approval           |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Bulk import is row-independent**        | When importing questions (Excel) or flashcards (CSV), each row is processed independently - invalid rows are reported without blocking valid ones. A file missing a required column is rejected in full. | Bulk import (Excel / CSV)                     |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **One essay submission per student**      | A Student may submit a given essay only once. Late submissions and second submissions are rejected.                                                                                                      | Essay submission                              |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Final essay grade is manual**           | The AI preliminary score is visible only to the Teacher and is never shown to the Student until confirmed. A final grade is recorded only after explicit teacher confirmation.                           | Essay grading & confirmation                  |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Practice scores stay unofficial**       | Self-created practice-test results are for self-assessment only and never enter the official gradebook or distort official progress metrics.                                                             | Practice test attempt                         |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Access checked on every paid access**   | Each time a Student opens paid content, the system verifies that a valid, unexpired AccessGrant exists.                                                                                                  | Paid content access                           |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Idempotent payment grant**              | A payment grants access exactly once. Duplicate gateway callbacks for the same transaction must not create a second grant. Invalid-signature callbacks are rejected entirely.                            | Payment callback processing                   |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Revoke before refund**                  | When a refund is processed, the Student's AccessGrant is revoked first, then the refund is issued through the gateway.                                                                                   | Refund processing                             |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **History survives revocation**           | Expiring or revoking access never deletes a Student's learning history - progress, test results, and essay submissions are all retained.                                                                 | Access expiry / revocation                    |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Group scope for Course Managers**       | A Course Manager may create classes, pricing, and subscription plans only within the CourseGroups assigned to them - enforced at the business layer, not only the UI.                                    | Class / pricing / plan management             |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Protected group deletion**              | A CourseGroup cannot be deleted while any Student holds an active subscription within it.                                                                                                                | CourseGroup deletion                          |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Internal roles are admin-provisioned**  | SME, Teacher, and Course Manager accounts can only be created by an Admin - these internal roles cannot self-register.                                                                                   | Internal account creation                     |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Aggregate-only analytics for managers** | Analytics shown to a Course Manager present aggregate figures only and never expose an individual Student's detailed data.                                                                               | Analytics access                              |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Activity log is immutable**             | System activity log entries record time, actor, action, and result, and cannot be edited or deleted through the interface - they are removed only by the automatic retention policy.                     | System activity logging                       |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |
| **Guest trial limits**                    | An unauthenticated Guest may preview at most 10 sample questions and 5 sample flashcards and cannot use any AI feature; exceeding the limit redirects to registration.                                   | Guest preview access                          |
| ---                                       | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ---                                           |

# III. User Requirements

## 1\. Actor Definitions

| **Actor**                       | **Description**                                                                                                                                                  | **Notes**                                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Admin                           | Manages system-wide accounts, role assignments, course groups, refunds, and system configuration.                                                                | Internal role. Manages SME, Teacher, and Course Manager accounts; cannot self-register.                       |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| SME                             | Creates, updates, and publishes original course content, including lessons, question banks, flashcards, and essay assignments.                                   | Internal role. Account is created by Admin and works on assigned courses only.                                |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Teacher                         | Manages class-specific supplementary materials, grades essay submissions, confirms final results, and monitors student progress.                                 | Internal role. Account is created by Admin and only operates on assigned classes.                             |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Course Manager                  | Manages class setup, pricing, subscription plans, enrollment information, and revenue reports within assigned course groups.                                     | Internal role. Account is created by Admin and only operates within assigned course groups.                   |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Student                         | Registers, enrolls in courses, selects payment methods, studies learning content, practices flashcards and quizzes, submits essays, and views personal progress. | External learner role. Can self-register via email/password or Google OAuth.                                  |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Guest                           | Browses the public course catalog and can try limited sample questions or sample flashcards.                                                                     | Unauthenticated visitor. Read-only access to public content only; no AI features or full course access.       |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Google Identity                 | External authentication service used for Google OAuth sign-up and sign-in.                                                                                       | Third-party service. Returns verified identity data and authentication tokens.                                |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| AI Language Model               | External AI service used to generate lesson drafts, question drafts, flashcard drafts, video summaries, and preliminary essay grading results.                   | Third-party service. All AI output must be reviewed or confirmed by the responsible user before official use. |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| YouTube Data API                | External service used to validate YouTube videos and provide video metadata and caption availability.                                                            | Third-party service used for video-based learning content.                                                    |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |
| Payment Gateway (VNPay / SePay) | External payment service used to process course payments and return payment confirmations and transaction status.                                                | Third-party service. Used for payment processing, callback confirmation, and refund-related operations.       |
| ---                             | ---                                                                                                                                                              | ---                                                                                                           |

Role hierarchy: Admin inherits all HR Manager permissions. No other inheritance applies.

## 2\. Permission Matrix

| **Entity**          | **Action**                                | **Admin** | **SME** | **Teacher** | **Course Manager** | **Student** | **Guest** |
| ------------------- | ----------------------------------------- | --------- | ------- | ----------- | ------------------ | ----------- | --------- |
| User account        | Self-register (email / Google)            | No        | No      | No          | No                 | Full        | Full      |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| User account        | Sign in                                   | Full      | Full    | Full        | Full               | Full        | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| User account        | Reset / change password                   | Full      | Full    | Full        | Full               | Full        | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| User account        | Manage own profile                        | Full      | Full    | Full        | Full               | Full        | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| User account        | Create internal account (SME/Teacher/CM)  | Full      | No      | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| User account        | Disable / reset password for others       | Full      | No      | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| CourseGroup         | Create / update / remove                  | Full      | No      | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| CourseGroup         | Assign Course Manager                     | Full      | No      | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | Manage course structure (modules)         | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | Publish / republish (version history)     | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | Configure single-course price             | No        | No      | No          | R                  | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | View public homepage / course list        | Full      | Full    | Full        | Full               | Full        | Full      |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | View course detail                        | Full      | Full    | Full        | Full               | Full        | Full      |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Course              | Preview sample content (10 Q / 5 cards)   | No        | No      | No          | No                 | No          | R         |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Lesson              | Author lessons & materials (manual)       | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Lesson              | Generate lesson content with AI           | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Lesson              | Add class-specific materials              | No        | No      | R           | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Question            | Manage question bank (CRUD / import)      | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Question            | Generate questions with AI (review gate)  | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Flashcards          | Manage flashcards (CRUD / import)         | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
| Flashcards          | Generate flashcards with AI (review gate) | No        | R       | No          | No                 | No          | No        |
| ---                 | ---                                       | ---       | ---     | ---         | ---                | ---         | ---       |
