## 4\. Use Case Index

| **UC-ID**  | **Use Case Name**                                 | **Type**        | **Primary Actor**                            | **Description**                                                                                                                                                                                     | **FT-ID Ref**                     |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------- | --------------- | -------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------- |
| UC-GST-01  | View Homepage                                     | UI              | Guest                                        | Guest views the EduNexus public homepage, system introduction, and navigation entry points to course information and registration.                                                                  | FT-10, FT-14                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-GST-02  | View Course List                                  | UI              | Guest                                        | Guest views the public list of available courses, including basic course information, course groups, and access options.                                                                            | FT-10, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-GST-03  | View Course Detail                                | UI              | Guest                                        | Guest opens a selected course to view description, objectives, course structure, price, preview information, and available access models.                                                           | FT-10, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-GST-04  | Preview Sample Content                            | UI              | Guest                                        | Guest tries limited sample content, including up to 10 sample questions and 5 sample flashcards, without accessing full content or AI features.                                                     | FT-10, FT-14                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-GST-05  | Register Account                                  | UI              | Guest                                        | Guest creates a Student account using email/password or Google OAuth. After successful verification, the Guest becomes a Student.                                                                   | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-AUTH-01 | Sign In                                           | UI              | Student, Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager | A registered user signs in using email/password or Google OAuth and is redirected to the correct role-based area.                                                                                   | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-AUTH-02 | Reset Password                                    | UI              | Registered user                              | A registered user requests a reset password link and sets a new password. Existing sessions are invalidated after successful reset.                                                                 | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-AUTH-03 | Manage User Profile                               | UI              | Registered user                              | A signed-in user updates display name, avatar, views account information, active sessions, owned courses, subscriptions, and payment history where applicable.                                      | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-AUTH-04 | Change Password                                   | UI              | Registered user                              | A signed-in user changes their password from the profile area. Other active sessions are signed out after the password is changed.                                                                  | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-01  | View Course List                                  | UI              | Student                                      | Student views available courses after signing in or from the public catalog area.                                                                                                                   | FT-10, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-02  | View Course Detail                                | UI              | Student                                      | Student opens a selected course to view learning content overview, pricing, access type, and enrollment options.                                                                                    | FT-10, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-03  | View Class List                                   | UI              | Student                                      | Student views available teacher-led classes, including class schedule, teacher, capacity, tuition fee, and enrollment status.                                                                       | FT-09, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-04  | View Class Detail                                 | UI              | Student                                      | Student opens a selected class to view detailed class information, course source, teacher, start/end date, capacity, tuition fee, and enrollment option.                                            | FT-09, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-05  | Enroll in Course                                  | UI              | Student                                      | Student enrolls in a single course access model after viewing course detail.                                                                                                                        | FT-11                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-06  | Enroll in Class                                   | UI              | Student                                      | Student enrolls in a teacher-led class after viewing class detail, subject to capacity and access rules.                                                                                            | FT-09, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-07  | Subscribe to Course Group                         | UI              | Student                                      | Student chooses a time-based subscription plan to access all courses in a selected course group.                                                                                                    | FT-10, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-08  | Pay for Enrollment                                | UI/API-assisted | Student                                      | Student pays through VNPay or SePay. The system waits for payment confirmation before granting access.                                                                                              | FT-11                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-09  | View My Courses / Classes                         | UI              | Student                                      | Student views courses, classes, and subscription-based content that they currently have access to.                                                                                                  | FT-11, FT-12                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-10  | Access Authorized Course / Class                  | UI              | Student                                      | Student selects an authorized course/class, enters the learning workspace, then reads lesson content, watches embedded videos, views summaries, downloads materials, and marks lessons as completed | FT-06, FT-11                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-11  | Practice Flashcards                               | UI              | Student                                      | Student practices flashcards by group or module, flips cards, and marks cards as known or unknown.                                                                                                  | FT-06                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-12  | Take Practice Quiz                                | UI              | Student                                      | Student creates a practice quiz by choosing module scope, question count, and difficulty, then submits answers and views detailed results.                                                          | FT-07                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-13  | Submit Essay Assignment                           | UI              | Student                                      | Student opens an essay assignment, reads the prompt and rubric, writes an answer, and submits it once before the deadline.                                                                          | FT-08                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-14  | View Grade and Feedback                           | UI              | Student                                      | Student views final essay grade, rubric-level scores, and teacher feedback after Teacher confirmation.                                                                                              | FT-08                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-STU-15  | View Personal Progress                            | UI              | Student                                      | Student views personal learning progress for an authorized course or class, including lesson completion, quiz trends, flashcard mastery, essay status, and grades.                                  | FT-12                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-01  | Manage Internal Accounts                          | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin creates and manages SME, Teacher, and Course Manager accounts, assigns roles, disables accounts, resets passwords, and views login history.                                                   | FT-15                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-02  | Manage Course Groups                              | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin creates, updates, or removes course groups used for course organization and subscription sales.                                                                                               | FT-10, FT-15                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-03  | Assign Course Manager to Course Group             | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin assigns Course Managers to specific course groups and defines their management scope.                                                                                                         | FT-10, FT-15                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-04  | Configure System Settings                         | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin configures upload limits, guest preview limits, class capacity limits, payment settings, and platform parameters.                                                                             | FT-15                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-05  | Manage AI Quotas and Usage                        | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin sets monthly AI token quotas for SME and Teacher roles, views AI usage, and monitors quota threshold warnings.                                                                                | FT-15                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-06  | Monitor System Status and Audit Logs              | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin views activity logs, abnormal login events, permission changes, payment events, external service status, and system errors.                                                                   | FT-15                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-07  | Process Refund Request                            | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin verifies a refund request, revokes the learner's access rights, and records the refund handling result.                                                                                       | FT-11, FT-15                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-ADM-08  | View System-Wide Reports                          | UI              | Admin                                        | Admin views overall revenue, active learners, class status, new accounts, system usage, and operational metrics.                                                                                    | FT-13, FT-15                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-01  | Manage Course Structure                           | UI              | SME                                          | SME creates or updates modules and lesson structure for assigned courses.                                                                                                                           | FT-01                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-02  | Author Lesson and Learning Materials              | UI              | SME                                          | SME creates lesson text, embeds YouTube videos, attaches learning files, arranges content order, and saves lesson materials.                                                                        | FT-02                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-03  | Generate Lesson Content with AI                   | UI              | SME                                          | SME provides a source (outline, pasted content, or a YouTube video URL), requests AI-generated lesson content, reviews the draft, edits it, and inserts accepted content into the lesson            | FT-02                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-04  | Manage Question Bank                              | UI              | SME                                          | SME creates, imports, searches, filters, edits, approves, or deletes multiple-choice questions in the course question bank.                                                                         | FT-03                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-05  | Generate Questions with AI                        | UI              | SME                                          | SME selects source content and requests AI-generated questions. Generated questions stay in a review queue until SME approval.                                                                      | FT-03                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-06  | Manage Flashcards                                 | UI              | SME                                          | SME creates, imports, groups, edits, moves, or deletes flashcards within course modules.                                                                                                            | FT-04                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-07  | Generate Flashcards with AI                       | UI              | SME                                          | SME selects source content and requests AI-generated term-definition flashcards. Generated flashcards require review before official use.                                                           | FT-04                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-08  | Create Essay Assignment and Rubric                | UI              | SME                                          | SME creates essay prompts, deadlines, grading rubric criteria, criterion weights, and maximum scores.                                                                                               | FT-05                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-09  | Publish or Update Course Content                  | UI              | SME                                          | SME publishes a completed course or republishes updated content. The system keeps version history and protects original content from class-level modification.                                      | FT-01, FT-02, FT-03, FT-04, FT-05 |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-SME-10  | View Content Quality Analytics                    | UI              | SME                                          | SME views analytics about difficult questions, overly easy questions, low-engagement lessons, and flashcards frequently marked as unknown.                                                          | FT-13                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-CM-01   | Create and Manage Class                           | UI              | Course Manager                               | Course Manager creates and manages classes within assigned course groups, including class name, start/end date, capacity, tuition fee, and assigned teacher.                                        | FT-09                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-CM-02   | Manage Class Student List                         | UI              | Course Manager                               | Course Manager views enrolled students, payment status, learning progress, removals, and reason logs within assigned classes.                                                                       | FT-09                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-CM-03   | Configure Course Pricing                          | UI              | Course Manager                               | Course Manager sets or updates single-course prices and class tuition within assigned course groups.                                                                                                | FT-10                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-CM-04   | Manage Subscription Plans                         | UI              | Course Manager                               | Course Manager creates and manages time-based subscription plans for course groups, such as 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, or 1-year plans.                                                             | FT-10                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-CM-05   | Monitor Enrollment and Revenue                    | UI              | Course Manager                               | Course Manager views enrollment counts, revenue by course, class, or subscription plan, renewal indicators, and assigned-scope business performance.                                                | FT-13                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-01  | View Assigned Classes                             | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher opens a class they are assigned to and views class overview, students, learning progress, materials, and assignments.                                                                       | FT-09, FT-13                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-02  | Add Class-Specific Materials                      | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher adds supplementary learning materials for assigned classes without modifying original SME-created course content.                                                                           | FT-02                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-03  | Create Class-Specific Flashcards                  | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher creates additional flashcards for a specific class while original course flashcards remain protected.                                                                                       | FT-04                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-04  | Create Class-Specific Essay Assignment and Rubric | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher creates class-specific essay assignments and grading rubrics for assigned classes.                                                                                                          | FT-05                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-05  | View Grading Queue                                | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher views submitted essays waiting for review and final confirmation.                                                                                                                           | FT-08                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-06  | Review Essay Submission and Confirm Grade         | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher opens submitted essays, reviews AI preliminary grading if available, adjusts scores if needed, writes feedback, and confirms the final grade.                                               | FT-08                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-07  | Monitor Class Progress                            | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher views class progress, inactive students, difficult modules, pending essays, and students at risk of falling behind.                                                                         | FT-13                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-TEA-08  | Send Class Notification                           | UI              | Teacher                                      | Teacher sends notifications to selected students or the whole class, such as inactivity reminders, deadline reminders, or class-related updates.                                                    | FT-09, FT-13                      |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-EXT-01  | Handle Google OAuth Callback                      | API             | Google Identity                              | Google Identity returns verified identity data and authentication result after the user chooses a Google account during registration or sign-in.                                                    | FT-14                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |
| UC-EXT-02  | Receive Payment Confirmation                      | API             | VNPay / SePay                                | Payment gateway sends payment confirmation, transaction status, gateway transaction ID, paid time, and signature. The system validates the confirmation before granting access.                     | FT-11                             |
| ---        | ---                                               | ---             | ---                                          | ---                                                                                                                                                                                                 | ---                               |

#

# IV. Functional Requirements

## 1\. Feature List

| **Feature**                   | **Purpose**                                                                                                              | **Primary Actor(s)**                         |
| ----------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------- |
| Course Content Management     | Build and publish course structures, lessons, question banks, flashcard decks, and essay assignments with rubrics        | Admin, SME, Teacher                          |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |
| Learning & Practice           | Students access lessons, practice flashcards, take self-generated quizzes, and submit essay assignments                  | Student                                      |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |
| Class & Enrollment Management | Create classes, configure catalog pricing and subscription packages, manage enrollment and payments                      | Admin, Course Manager, Student               |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |
| Analytics & Reporting         | Track individual learning progress and view class, content, and revenue performance analytics                            | Student, Teacher, SME, Course Manager, Admin |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |
| Authentication & User Profile | Account registration, sign-in, password management, and personal profile management                                      | All roles                                    |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |
| System Administration         | User and role management, system configuration, AI usage monitoring, refund processing, notification, and activity audit | Admin, Teacher                               |
| ---                           | ---                                                                                                                      | ---                                          |

## 2\. Screen Inventory

### a. Screen Flow

_This part shows the system screens and the relationship among screens. You can draw the Screens Flow for the system in the form of diagram as below_

![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

### b. Screen List

_Fill details of each screen into the table with the columns and sample data as below_

| **SCR-ID** | **Screen Name**               | **Feature**    | **Description**                                                     |
| ---------- | ----------------------------- | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **SCR-01** | Landing Page (Public Catalog) | Public / Auth  | Landing portal and public course catalog.                           |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-02** | User Register                 | Public / Auth  | Registration screen for new students.                               |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-03** | Sign In                       | Public / Auth  | Common login screen for all user roles.                             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-04** | Password Change               | Public / Auth  | Password reset and change screen.                                   |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-05** | User Profile                  | Public / Auth  | Manage personal account information.                                |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-06** | Admin Dashboard               | Admin          | High-level dashboard for System Administrators.                     |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-07** | User Management               | Admin          | Manage user accounts, permissions, and status.                      |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-08** | System Config                 | Admin          | Configure system settings and AI quotas.                            |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-09** | Activity Log                  | Admin          | View system audit logs and service health.                          |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-10** | Course Group Setup            | Admin          | Configure course groups and assignments.                            |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-11** | Course Management             | Admin          | Oversee and moderate all system courses.                            |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-12** | CM Dashboard                  | Course Manager | Overview dashboard for Course Managers.                             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-13** | Class Management              | Course Manager | Manage and open class sessions.                                     |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-14** | Assign Teacher                | Course Manager | Assign instructors to specific classes.                             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-15** | Revenue Analytics             | Course Manager | View course and class revenue reports.                              |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-16** | Catalog & Pricing             | Course Manager | Manage catalog visibility and course pricing.                       |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-17** | Manage Plans                  | Course Manager | Configure pricing plans and subscriptions.                          |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-18** | SME Course Editor             | SME            | Main dashboard for Subject Matter Experts (SME).                    |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-19** | Lesson Author                 | SME            | WYSIWYG editor for drafting lesson content (Text, Video, AI Draft). |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-20** | Gen AI Draft                  | SME            | AI-assisted lesson drafting tool.                                   |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-21** | Flashcard Editor              | SME            | Main screen for managing the flashcard bank.                        |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-22** | Flashcard Import              | SME            | Import flashcards from external files.                              |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-23** | AI Flashcard Review           | SME            | Review and approve flashcards generated by AI.                      |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-24** | Gen AI Card                   | SME            | Tool to automatically generate flashcards using AI.                 |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-25** | Content Analytics             | SME            | View engagement and effectiveness reports for course content.       |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-26** | Question Bank                 | SME            | Main screen for managing the question bank.                         |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-27** | AI Question Review            | SME            | Review and approve questions generated by AI.                       |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-28** | Gen AI Question               | SME            | Tool to automatically generate quiz questions using AI.             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-29** | Question Import               | SME            | Import question banks from external files.                          |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-30** | Teacher Dashboard             | Teacher        | Dashboard overview for Instructors.                                 |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-31** | Assignment Editor             | Teacher        | Create and assign essays and exercises.                             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-32** | Class Roster                  | Teacher        | Manage the list of enrolled students in a class.                    |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-33** | Grading Queue                 | Teacher        | Queue of pending student submissions to be graded.                  |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-34** | Grade Detail (AI + Confirm)   | Teacher        | Detailed grading interface with AI assistance and confirmation.     |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-35** | Lesson Editor (Supplement)    | Teacher        | Add or update supplementary lesson materials.                       |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-36** | Class Analytics               | Teacher        | View class performance and progress reports.                        |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-37** | Building Grading Rubric       | Teacher        | Define and edit grading criteria (Rubrics).                         |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-38** | Student Dashboard             | Student        | Personalized learning dashboard for Students.                       |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-39** | Course Catalog                | Student        | Browse and search for available courses.                            |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-40** | Enrollment & Payment          | Student        | Enroll in classes and process payments.                             |
| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
| **SCR-41** | Lesson Page                   | Student        | Primary learning interface (video player, reading materials).       |

| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |

| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |

| ---        | ---                           | ---            | ---                                                                 |
