## 3\. External API Inventory

| API-ID | API Name                                          | Calling Path                     | Description                                                                                                                                                                        |
| ------ | ------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| API-01 | Google OAuth Authentication                       | EduNexus -> Google Identity      | Authenticates users through Google OAuth and returns verified identity/profile data for registration or sign-in. Email/password registration does not use this API.                |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-02 | YouTube Video Validation and Transcript Retrieval | EduNexus -> YouTube Data API     | Validates YouTube video links and retrieves video metadata, caption, or transcript availability for lesson embedding and AI-supported video summarization.                         |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-03 | AI Lesson and Content Draft Generation            | EduNexus -> AI Language Model    | Generates draft lesson content, video summary support, question drafts, and flashcard drafts for SME review. AI output is draft/support only and is never published automatically. |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-04 | AI Essay Preliminary Grading                      | EduNexus -> AI Language Model    | Provides preliminary rubric-based grading suggestions for essay submissions. Teacher confirmation is required before final grade and feedback are returned to Student.             |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-05 | VNPay / SePay Payment Transaction API             | EduNexus -> VNPay / SePay        | Creates secure payment transactions for course, class, or subscription enrollment and sends payment context to the selected gateway.                                               |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-06 | Payment Confirmation Webhook                      | VNPay / SePay -> EduNexus        | Receives asynchronous payment confirmation/status callbacks. EduNexus validates payment results and grants access only after successful verified confirmation.                     |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |
| API-07 | Payment Refund / Status API                       | EduNexus &lt;-&gt; VNPay / SePay | Processes payment/refund status requests after valid operational review. Refund handling must preserve learning history while revoking access when required.                       |
| ---    | ---                                               | ---                              | ---                                                                                                                                                                                |

## 4\. Background Job Inventory

| JOB-ID | Job Name                                              | Group                    | Description                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------ | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| JOB-01 | Payment Confirmation Reconciliation                   | Scheduled / Event-driven | Validates and reconciles VNPay/SePay payment callbacks, prevents duplicate processing, and grants paid access only once after successful verified payment.            |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |
| JOB-02 | Access Expiry and Revocation                          | Scheduled                | Revokes expired class or subscription access while preserving learning progress, submissions, quiz history, and learning records.                                     |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |
| JOB-03 | Analytics Refresh                                     | Scheduled                | Refreshes class progress, inactive learner, completion, enrollment, revenue, refund, and content-performance analytics for Teacher, Course Manager, and Admin scopes. |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |
| JOB-04 | Notification Scheduler                                | Scheduled / Event-driven | Sends payment, class-start, essay deadline, subscription expiry, grade confirmation, inactive learner, and internal account invitation notifications.                 |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |
| JOB-05 | AI Request Retry / Quota Monitoring                   | Scheduled / Event-driven | Retries temporary AI failures, marks exhausted AI tasks as failed, tracks AI usage, and triggers quota warnings based on configured limits.                           |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |
| JOB-06 | Audit Log Retention and External Service Health Check | Scheduled                | Maintains audit log retention and checks external service health such as AI provider, YouTube API, payment gateway, and mail service.                                 |
| ---    | ---                                                   | ---                      | ---                                                                                                                                                                   |

##

## V. Non-Functional Requirements

### This section defines measurable non-functional requirements and constraints for the EduNexus Platform. The requirements below support the business flows for course publishing, class setup, student enrollment/payment, learning assessment, and class administration

## 1\. External Interfaces

### EduNexus communicates with external services for authentication, AI support, video learning content, payment confirmation, and notifications. Each integration must fail safely without granting unauthorized access or publishing unreviewed content

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Interface</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Purpose</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Key Requirements</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Related Scope</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Google Identity</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Supports Google OAuth sign-up and sign-in.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Identity data must be verified before account creation or login. If the same email already exists, the Google identity is linked to the existing account instead of creating a duplicate.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Registration, sign-in, account identity</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI Language Model</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Supports draft lesson summaries, questions, flashcards, and preliminary essay grading.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI output is support-only. AI-generated questions, flashcards, summaries, and grading results require authorized review before official use or publication.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Content authoring, practice, essay grading</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>YouTube Data API</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Validates YouTube video links and transcript/caption availability for lesson content.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>If a video or transcript is unavailable, video summary support is disabled for that item while manual content authoring remains available.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Lesson content and video summary</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment Gateway (VNPay / SePay)</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Confirms payments and refund-related status for paid enrollments.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment callbacks must be signature-validated and idempotent. Failed, invalid, expired, unsigned, or duplicate callbacks must not grant duplicate access.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Checkout, enrollment, refund</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Notification / Mail Service</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Sends system notifications such as account invitations, payment results, class reminders, grade confirmations, and subscription expiry warnings.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Notification failure must not break core transactions. Failed jobs should be logged and retried according to the background-job rules.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Class operation and administration</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

## 2\. Quality Attributes

### 2.1 Usability

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Requirement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Target / Rule</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Condition</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Role-based navigation</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>After sign-in, users are directed to the correct workspace based on role: Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager, or Student.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>All authenticated sessions</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Clear user feedback</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>The system displays clear success, warning, error, empty-state, and pending-state messages for registration, checkout, content publishing, AI processing, and grading.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>All UI workflows</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Student learning clarity</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Students can clearly see accessible courses/classes, learning progress, practice results, essay status, and confirmed feedback.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Student dashboard and learning workspace</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Content review clarity</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>SMEs and Teachers can distinguish draft, pending-review, approved, rejected, published, and confirmed states before taking action.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Content authoring and grading flows</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Responsive interface</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Core pages remain usable on common laptop and tablet screen sizes without horizontal scrolling for normal forms and tables.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Catalog, dashboard, learning, admin pages</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Import error visibility</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>When bulk import is used, valid rows and invalid rows are reported separately so users can correct only failed rows.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Question Excel import and flashcard CSV import</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

### 2.2 Performance

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Requirement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Target</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Condition</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Page load time</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Common pages load within 3 seconds.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Up to 100 active users on a normal deployment</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Search and filtering</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Course catalog, user lists, enrollment lists, and payment lists respond within 2 seconds for common filters.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Normal dataset size for the project version</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Form submission response</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>The system acknowledges normal create/update/submit actions within 2 seconds.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Registration, course content save, checkout start, essay submission</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment callback processing</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Verified payment callbacks are processed within 5 seconds and update access status once.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>VNPay / SePay callback received by the system</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Dashboard and reports</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Aggregated dashboards load within 5 seconds.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Course Manager and Admin report views</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>File upload limit</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>The system accepts supported learning and submission files up to the configured size limit and rejects unsupported files with a clear message.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Lesson attachments, import files, essay submissions</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI and transcript processing</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Long-running AI or YouTube transcript tasks run asynchronously and show a pending/failed state instead of blocking the user interface.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI generation, video summary, preliminary grading</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

### 2.3 Security and Privacy

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Requirement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Rule</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Applies To</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Authentication required</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>All private dashboards and actions require a valid signed-in session. Only public catalog preview, registration, and sign-in are accessible without authentication.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Private system pages</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Role-based authorization</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Each action is restricted by role and assigned scope. Course Managers operate only within assigned CourseGroups; Teachers operate only on assigned classes; Students see only their own learning data.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Admin, SME, Teacher, Course Manager, Student</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Paid access validation</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Every request to paid content checks that the Student has a valid active Enrollment or subscription access record.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Courses, classes, lessons, practice, assessments</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment protection</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment references are unique, callbacks are verified, and duplicate callbacks cannot create duplicate access grants.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Payment and enrollment</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Password protection</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Passwords must not be stored or displayed in readable form.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Email/password accounts</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI result protection</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI preliminary scores and AI-generated content are not exposed as final official results until authorized confirmation or approval is complete.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI content and essay grading</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>File access control</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Attached files, import files, and student submissions must not be accessible through guessable public links.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Attachments and submissions</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Audit trail</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Important actions are logged with actor, time, action, target, and result. Activity logs are not editable through the user interface.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Admin actions, payments, access changes, publishing, grading</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

### 2.4 Reliability and Data Integrity

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Requirement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Target / Rule</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Condition</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Safe external failure</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>If AI, YouTube, payment, or notification services are unavailable, the system records the failure and preserves existing user data.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>External service failure</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>No automatic AI publishing</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI-generated drafts never enter the official live bank or final gradebook automatically.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI generation and grading</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Learning history preservation</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Access expiry, revocation, refund, or class closure never deletes progress, practice results, or submissions.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Enrollment expiry/revocation</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Refund consistency</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Access is revoked before refund completion, and the learning history remains available for audit/reporting.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Refund processing</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Class content integrity</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Teacher class supplements do not overwrite original SME-owned course content.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Teacher-added class materials</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Scheduled job resilience</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Background jobs for access expiry, reminders, reports, AI retry, and audit retention may be retried safely without duplicating grants or messages beyond the configured retry policy.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Background jobs</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

### 2.5 Maintainability and Compatibility

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Requirement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Rule</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Applies To</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Stable identifiers</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>BF-ID, UC-ID, FT-ID, GBR-ID, JOB-ID, and MSG codes should remain stable once assigned so PRD, UCS, and TDS remain traceable.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Documentation and implementation traceability</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Configurable external services</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>External service endpoints, credentials, quotas, and retry settings are configuration values, not hard-coded business rules.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Google, AI, YouTube, payment, mail</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Browser compatibility</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>The web interface supports current versions of common desktop browsers used by students and staff.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Web UI</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Business-layer enforcement</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Critical rules such as role scope, access validity, AI approval, and payment idempotency are enforced by the system layer, not only by hiding UI buttons.</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Security and business rules</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

### 2.6 Technical Assumptions and Out of Scope

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Item</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Statement</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Technical assumption</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>EduNexus is delivered as a web-based platform with role-based dashboards and external integrations for Google OAuth, AI support, YouTube transcript validation, payment gateways, and notifications.</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Technical assumption</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>AI features are supportive features. The platform must remain usable through manual authoring and manual grading when AI support is unavailable.</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Out of scope</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Unreviewed automatic publishing of AI-generated course content, questions, flashcards, or final essay grades.</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Out of scope</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Offline learning mode and native mobile applications for this version.</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Out of scope</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Direct modification of SME-owned original course content by Teachers. Teachers may only add class-level supplements.</h3></th></tr><tr><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.ss6p8n2vtsav"></a>Out of scope</h3></th><th><h3><a id="_heading=h.j1kurpasnkzl"></a>Public access to paid learning content without verified enrollment or valid subscription access.</h3></th></tr></thead></table></div>

###

# VI. Requirement Appendix

## 1\. Global Business Rules

| **GBR-ID** | **Rule Statement**                                                                                                                                          | **Applies To**                               | **Rationale**                                                         | **Enforced By**                                                   |
| ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| GBR-01     | Email must be unique across all user accounts. A Google sign-up with an existing email links to the existing account instead of creating a duplicate.       | Account registration; Google account linking | Maintains one identity per learner or staff member.                   | System validation on every registration and Google OAuth callback |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-02     | Internal roles such as SME, Teacher, and Course Manager can only be created by Admin; they cannot self-register.                                            | Internal account creation                    | Protects staff permissions and prevents unauthorized internal access. | Admin user-management workflow and role validation                |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-03     | Each Course is authored by exactly one assigned SME. Teachers may add class-level supplements but cannot modify or delete SME-owned original content.       | Course authoring; teacher supplements        | Preserves ownership and quality control of original course content.   | Course permission checks and class-supplement scope checks        |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-04     | A Course cannot be published unless it contains at least one Module.                                                                                        | Course publishing                            | Prevents empty courses from appearing in the catalog.                 | Publish action validation                                         |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-05     | AI-generated questions and flashcards enter Pending-review and become official only after SME approval.                                                     | AI content generation; SME review            | Ensures AI output is reviewed before learners use it.                 | SME approval workflow                                             |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-06     | AI-assisted lesson drafts and summaries are support content only and are never published automatically.                                                     | Lesson authoring; AI assistance              | Keeps SME responsible for final learning content quality.             | Manual review and publish controls                                |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-07     | Bulk imports process each row independently. Invalid rows are reported without blocking valid rows; files missing required columns are rejected completely. | Question import; flashcard import            | Allows efficient import while protecting required data structure.     | Import validation and row-level error report                      |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-08     | A Student may submit a given essay assignment only once. Late submissions and second submissions are rejected.                                              | Essay submission                             | Prevents duplicate official submissions and grading confusion.        | Submission validation                                             |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-09     | AI preliminary essay scores are visible only to Teacher and never become final until Teacher confirmation.                                                  | Essay grading and feedback confirmation      | Keeps official grading under teacher control.                         | Teacher confirmation workflow                                     |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-10     | Self-created practice-test scores are for self-assessment only and never enter the official gradebook.                                                      | Practice test attempt; learner progress      | Separates informal practice from official assessment.                 | Progress and gradebook rules                                      |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-11     | Paid content access is checked every time a Student opens paid content and requires a valid, unexpired access grant.                                        | Course, class, and subscription access       | Prevents unauthorized access after expiry or revocation.              | Access-check middleware / service validation                      |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-12     | A payment grants access exactly once. Duplicate, unsigned, invalid, failed, or expired gateway callbacks must not create duplicate access.                  | Payment callback processing                  | Protects revenue integrity and prevents duplicate enrollment grants.  | Payment reference uniqueness and callback verification            |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-13     | When a refund is processed, access is revoked before the refund is issued, and learning history is preserved.                                               | Refund processing; access revocation         | Keeps financial status and learning history consistent.               | Refund workflow and enrollment status update                      |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-14     | Course Managers may manage classes, pricing, and subscription plans only within their assigned CourseGroups.                                                | Class, pricing, subscription-plan management | Limits operational access to assigned business scope.                 | Business-layer authorization checks                               |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |
| GBR-15     | Guests may preview only limited sample content and cannot use AI features; exceeding the trial limit redirects to registration.                             | Guest preview access                         | Encourages registration while protecting full learning features.      | Guest access limit rules                                          |
| ---        | ---                                                                                                                                                         | ---                                          | ---                                                                   | ---                                                               |

## 2\. System Messages

| **#** | **Message code** | **Message Type** | **Context**                                 | **Content**                                                                           |
| ----- | ---------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 1     | MSG-01           | Inline           | No catalog/search result                    | No matching courses were found. Please try another keyword or filter.                 |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 2     | MSG-02           | Validation       | Required field is empty                     | This field is required.                                                               |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 3     | MSG-03           | Validation       | Duplicate email during registration         | This email is already registered. Please sign in or use another email.                |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 4     | MSG-04           | Toast / Success  | Google sign-in linked to existing account   | Google sign-in completed successfully. Your account has been linked.                  |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 5     | MSG-05           | Error            | Disabled account sign-in attempt            | Your account has been disabled. Please contact the administrator.                     |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 6     | MSG-06           | Validation       | Course publish without module               | A course must contain at least one module before publishing.                          |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 7     | MSG-07           | Info             | AI-generated content waiting for SME review | AI-generated content has been saved as draft and is waiting for SME approval.         |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 8     | MSG-08           | Error            | YouTube video/transcript unavailable        | Video summary is unavailable because the video or transcript cannot be accessed.      |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 9     | MSG-09           | Toast / Success  | Course content published                    | Course content has been published successfully.                                       |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 10    | MSG-10           | Info             | Payment pending                             | Your payment is being verified. Access will be granted after successful confirmation. |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 11    | MSG-11           | Error            | Payment failed or invalid callback          | Payment confirmation failed. No learning access has been granted.                     |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 12    | MSG-12           | Error            | Paid content access denied                  | You do not have valid access to this content. Please enroll or renew your access.     |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 13    | MSG-13           | Validation       | Duplicate essay submission                  | You have already submitted this essay assignment. Resubmission is not allowed.        |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 14    | MSG-14           | Toast / Success  | Teacher confirms final grade                | Final grade and feedback have been confirmed successfully.                            |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
| 15    | MSG-15           | Warning          | Guest preview limit exceeded                | You have reached the guest preview limit. Please register to continue learning.       |
| ---   | ---              | ---              | ---                                         | ---                                                                                   |
